_doc: CNN training hyperparameters. Select a profile via the 'active_profile' field or the DYSON_PROFILE environment variable (env var takes precedence). Profiles are fully self-contained — no merging of defaults.

colab_full._doc: Full training on NVIDIA GPU in Google Colab. Used for final runs that produce figures for the article.

mac_full._doc: Full training locally on Apple Silicon Mac via tensorflow-metal. No mixed precision (Metal does not support float16 reliably). Slower than Colab but usable when Colab is unavailable.

mac_dev._doc: Fast dev iterations on Mac. Slices the full dataset to 500 samples and runs 10 epochs. Intended for debugging pipeline plumbing, not for producing meaningful metrics.
